name: nexus
description: Nexus core — a stack-agnostic multi-agent team pipeline (architect, developer, reviewer, PO, critic, learner, team-lead, solo) with always-on rules, persona commands, process skills, and a security guard.

security_mode.title: Security mode
security_mode.description: Install posture: open (block catastrophic actions only — recommended) | hardened (strict, for teams/CI) | off (no guard).

token_audit.title: Audit trail (tool calls + token consumption)
token_audit.description: When on, the audit-logger records a per-session tool-call trace (.claude/audit/{session}.log — agent, tool, file/command detail) and per-agent token usage (.claude/audit/token-usage.jsonl) for the consumption-report skill. Add .claude/audit/ to your .gitignore. Default off — truly zero work when disabled (no files, no directories).
